ux-designer.hint: Findings about code are reported in your review, not fixed.

frontend-developer.hint: Backend (src/), specs, and tests are other lanes — raise an OPEN QUESTION if you are blocked.

backend-developer.hint: UI files (web/) and tests are other lanes — raise an OPEN QUESTION if you are blocked.

qa-engineer.hint: A failing behavior becomes a defect report in docs/qa/defects/ — never a code fix.

technical-writer.hint: You document the shipped state; code, specs, tests, and other docs are other lanes — raise an OPEN QUESTION if you are blocked.
